heading: Medal of honor: presentation of Medal of Honor Flag
label: 8307 Medal of honor: presentation of Medal of Honor Flag
text: The President shall provide for the presentation of the Medal of Honor Flag designated under to each person to whom a medal of honor is awarded under . Presentation of the flag shall be made at the same time as the presentation of the medal under section 8291 or 8300 of this title. In the case of a posthumous presentation of the medal, the flag shall be presented to the person to whom the medal is presented.section 903 of title 36section 8291 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 8307, , , related to promotion of officers in regular grade of brigadier general to grade of major general, prior to repeal by , , , effective .
